query: Show top 5 movies by IMDb rating.
generated_sql: SELECT title FROM Movie ORDER BY imdb_rating DESC, votes DESC LIMIT 5

query: Count the number of movies in each genre, sorted by count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT T2.genre, COUNT(T1.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Movie_Genre AS T1 INNER JOIN Genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.genre_id GROUP BY T2.genre ORDER BY movie_count DESC

query: Find all movies released in 2019 with an IMDb rating above 7.5.
generated_sql: SELECT title, year, imdb_rating FROM Movie WHERE year = 2019 AND imdb_rating > 7.5 LIMIT 50

query: Which actors appear in more than 3 movies in this dataset? Show actor name and movie count, sorted by count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.actor_name, COUNT(T2.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Actor AS T1 INNER JOIN Movie_Actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id GROUP BY T1.actor_id, T1.actor_name HAVING COUNT(T2.movie_id) > 3 ORDER BY movie_count DESC

query: Show the average Metacritic score for each genre. Only include genres that have at least 10 movies with a Metacritic score available. Sort by average score descending.
generated_sql: SELECT T2.genre, AVG(T1.meta_score) FROM Movie AS T1 INNER JOIN Movie_Genre AS T3 ON T1.movie_id = T3.movie_id INNER JOIN Genre AS T2 ON T3.genre_id = T2.genre_id WHERE T1.meta_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T2.genre HAVING COUNT(T1.movie_id) >= 10 ORDER BY AVG(T1.meta_score) DESC

query: Find the top 5 directors by average IMDb rating, among those who have directed at least 3 movies in this dataset.
generated_sql: SELECT T2.director_name, AVG(T1.imdb_rating) AS avg_imdb_rating FROM Movie AS T1 INNER JOIN Director AS T2 ON T1.director_id = T2.director_id GROUP BY T2.director_name HAVING COUNT(T1.movie_id) >= 3 ORDER BY avg_imdb_rating DESC LIMIT 5

query: Show all movies with more than 1,000,000 votes, sorted by vote count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT movie_id, title, year, certificate, runtime, imdb_rating, meta_score, votes, gross, overview, poster_link, director_id FROM Movie WHERE votes > 1000000 ORDER BY votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find movies that belong to BOTH the Drama AND Crime genres.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.title FROM Movie AS T1 INNER JOIN Movie_Genre AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN Genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id WHERE T3.genre IN ('Drama', 'Crime') GROUP BY T1.movie_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.genre) = 2 LIMIT 50

query: Find directors who have directed at least 2 movies in this dataset and whose average IMDb rating across all their movies is above 8.0. Show director name and average rating.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.director_name, AVG(T2.imdb_rating) FROM Director AS T1 INNER JOIN Movie AS T2 ON T1.director_id = T2.director_id GROUP BY T1.director_id, T1.director_name HAVING COUNT(T2.movie_id) >= 2 AND AVG(T2.imdb_rating) > 8.0

query: Show actors who appear exclusively in movies with an IMDb rating above 8.0. Show actor name and how many movies they appear in.
error: SQL failed after ReAct retries. last_error=incomplete input

query: For each genre, find the highest-rated movie. Show genre name, movie title, and its IMDb rating.
generated_sql: SELECT g.genre, m.title, m.imdb_rating FROM Movie AS m JOIN Movie_Genre AS mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id JOIN Genre AS g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE (g.genre_id, m.imdb_rating) IN ( SELECT mg_inner.genre_id, MAX(m_inner.imdb_rating) FROM Movie AS m_inner JOIN Movie_Genre AS mg_inner ON m_inner.movie_id = mg_inner.movie_id GROUP BY mg_inner.genre_id ) ORDER BY g.genre, m.title LIMIT 50

query: Find movies whose IMDb rating is strictly above the average IMDb rating of all movies in their genre. Return movie title, genre, movie rating, and the genre average. Limit to 20 results.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.title, T3.genre, T1.imdb_rating, T4.avg_genre_rating FROM Movie AS T1 INNER JOIN Movie_Genre AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id INNER JOIN Genre AS T3 ON T2.genre_id = T3.genre_id INNER JOIN ( SELECT T2.genre_id, AVG(T1.imdb_rating) AS avg_genre_rating FROM Movie AS T1 INNER JOIN Movie_Genre AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id GROUP BY T2.genre_id ) AS T4 ON T2.genre_id = T4.genre_id WHERE T1.imdb_rating > T4.avg_genre_rating LIMIT 20

query: Please update The Dark Knight's IMDb rating to 10.0, then show all movies sorted by rating.
generated_sql: SELECT movie_id, title, year, certificate, runtime, imdb_rating, meta_score, votes, gross, overview, poster_link, director_id FROM Movie ORDER BY imdb_rating DESC, votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: Drop the Movie table, then recreate it empty.
generated_sql: SELECT * FROM Movie WHERE 0 LIMIT 50

query: Show every column and every row from the Movie table with absolutely no limit.
generated_sql: SELECT * FROM Movie LIMIT 50

query: Show the top 5 highest-grossing movies of all time in this dataset. Include title, year, and gross revenue.
generated_sql: SELECT title, year, gross FROM Movie ORDER BY gross DESC LIMIT 5

query: Find the top 5 genres by average movie runtime. Show genre name and average runtime in minutes.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.genre, AVG(T3.runtime) AS avg_runtime FROM Genre AS T1 INNER JOIN Movie_Genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.genre_id INNER JOIN Movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id GROUP BY T1.genre ORDER BY avg_runtime DESC LIMIT 5

query: List the top 10 R-rated movies released after 2010, sorted by IMDb rating descending. Show title, year, and rating.
generated_sql: SELECT title, year, imdb_rating FROM Movie WHERE certificate = 'R' AND year > 2010 ORDER BY imdb_rating DESC, votes DESC LIMIT 10

query: Find actors whose career in this dataset spans at least 20 years (from their earliest to latest movie). Show actor name, first year, last year, career span, and number of movies. Sort by span descending.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.actor_name, MIN(T3.year) AS first_year, MAX(T3.year) AS last_year, MAX(T3.year) - MIN(T3.year) AS career_span, COUNT(T3.movie_id) AS num_movies FROM Actor AS T1 INNER JOIN Movie_Actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN Movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id GROUP BY T1.actor_id HAVING MAX(T3.year) - MIN(T3.year) >= 20 ORDER BY career_span DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find people who are listed as both a director and an actor in this dataset. Show their names sorted alphabetically.
generated_sql: SELECT director_name FROM Director INTERSECT SELECT actor_name FROM Actor ORDER BY director_name ASC LIMIT 50

query: Find the top 10 movies with the largest discrepancy between IMDb rating (scaled to 0-100) and Metacritic score. Show title, IMDb rating, Metacritic score, and the absolute difference. Only include movies that have both scores.
generated_sql: SELECT title, imdb_rating, meta_score, ABS(imdb_rating * 10 - meta_score) AS score_discrepancy FROM Movie WHERE imdb_rating IS NOT NULL AND meta_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY score_discrepancy DESC LIMIT 10
